8.1.2.en: v8.1.2: Fixed duplicate button initialization in scene switch drivers, undefined variables, physical button detection (PhysicalButtonMixin), switch_usb_dongle and sensor_contact_motion configs. Updated scene_switch drivers.

8.1.1.en: v8.1.1: Fixed Issue #331 — Settings tab crash on 6 drivers (Hybrid*Base renamed to Unified*Base). Fixed curtain_motor_tilt missing flow cards (turn_on, turn_off, toggle). Fixed valve_irrigation device class (thermostat→socket). Added bed_sensor driver for _TZE200_seq9cm6u. Added CT Clamp _TZE28C1000000_81yrt3lo to power_clamp_meter. New fingerprints across 8 drivers.

8.1.0.en: New fingerprints for RGB bulbs, RGBW bulbs, air purifiers, and air quality sensors. Soil sensor driver added. Bug fixes for bulb color control and air quality reporting.

7.5.53.en: v7.5.52: Fixed button_wireless_3 and button_wireless_4 driver issues (diagnostic Log 99ead539), Fixed ir_blaster device capability handling, Fixed soil_sensor measure_soil_moisture capability, Fixed plug_smart driver compose, Fixed switch driver issues

7.5.52.en: Bug fixes for button_wireless_3/4, ir_blaster, soil_sensor, plug_smart and switch drivers. Fixed diagnostic issues Log 99ead539.

7.5.51.en: Bug fix: resolved fingerprint collision for _TZ3000_h1ipgkwn. Improved USB dongle switch driver with flow cards and multi-endpoint support. Added new fingerprints.

7.5.50.en: 166 new fingerprints added across 8 drivers. Fixed fingerprint collisions and removed incorrect matches. Generic DIY, PIR mmwave, SR_ZS_SWITCH, and valve_irrigation enriched.

7.5.49.en: New driver: presence sensor microwave (pir_mmwave_sensor). New fingerprints via Phoenix Sovereign v8.1.0. SONOFF case variations in button_wireless. Power clamp meter watt tracking improved. Flow card cleanup per PR#120.

7.5.48.en: Bug fix: clamp meter watt/voltage scaling corrected. New fingerprints added across multiple drivers. Flow repair tool integrated for device/flow replacement.

7.5.46.en: v7.5.46 - Maintenance release. No new devices or fixes.

7.5.45.en: Bug fixes across 7 drivers including humidifier, motion_sensor_2, dimmer_dual_channel, smart_button_switch, and pet_feeder. Updated 8 device interviews. 6755 fingerprints.

7.5.44.en: Bug fixes for wireless buttons, remote buttons, and scene switches. Critical runtime errors resolved in button devices.

7.5.43.en: Bug fixes: wall flow cards on multi-gang switches, wireless button reliability, climate sensor battery/pressure, partial battery sensor fix. Driver updates for soil sensor, button wireless plug, curtain motors, floor heating.

7.5.42.en: v7.5.41: Fixed battery endpoint scan handling for better battery device detection, Fixed Fingerbot capability registration timing (Issue #162), Added 3,202 new fingerprints from ZHA, Z2M, Z-Link and ZCT sources, Improved kinetic detection for soil sensors, Added fingerprint support to soil_sensor, bulb_rgbw, climate_sensor, switch_1gang, wall_remote_2_gang, and wall_switch_1gang_1way drivers

7.5.41.en: v7.5.41 - 3,202 new fingerprints from ZHA, Z2M, Z-Link and ZCT. Battery endpoint scan fix, Fingerbot capability timing fix, and kinetic detection improvement for soil sensors.

7.5.40.en: Bug fix: Empty battery reports on sleepy devices resolved with adaptive battery listeners and ZCL/IAS fallbacks.

7.5.39.en: Updated 3202 fingerprints across 228 drivers. Added new device support and minor fixes.

7.5.38.en: No user-facing changes in this release.

7.5.37.en: Fix all runtime syntax errors, resolve unclosed braces, add support for wall_remote_2_gang assets and validate SDK3 compliance

7.5.36.en: v7.5.35: Fix all runtime syntax errors, resolve unclosed braces, add support for wall_remote_2_gang assets and validate SDK3 compliance

7.5.35.en: v7.5.34: Fixed condition card registration in `air_quality_comprehensive` and `din_rail_meter` drivers (resolved runtime errors), Restored draft-to-test, Standardized button flow cards (button_pressed, button_double_press, button_long_press, button_multi_press, button_release, knob_rotated), Added OTA check updates action card, Added tuya_dp_send_typed and tuya_dp

7.5.34.en: v7.5.34: Fixed condition card registration in air_quality_comprehensive and din_rail_meter drivers. Standardized button flow cards. Synced upstream fixes from upstream.
